name: colorpulse6-skills
description: Personal Claude Code skills for PR review and quality-gated push pipelines. Auto-detects project type (frontend/backend/full-stack) and package manager.

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: AI-powered PR review with contract verification, frontend and backend rules, inbox mode, and incremental re-review. Auto-detects project type and applies relevant rules.

plugins.name: push
plugins.description: Quality-gated push pipeline. Auto-detects package manager and runs type check, lint, tests, build in parallel. Auto-fixes failures, creates PR, polls CI.
